svg.title: Salesforce Org Health Monitor — architecture diagram
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: scan trigger, six health check modules, scoring engine, persistence layer, and LWC dashboard output.

g.text: Manual (LWC button) · Scheduled (Apex scheduler) · On-demand API

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the metadata analyser check in Salesforce org health?')
sendPrompt('What does the automation auditor check in Salesforce?')
sendPrompt('What does the security scanner check in Salesforce org health?')
sendPrompt('How does the Apex code quality checker work?')
sendPrompt('What does the data quality module check in Salesforce?')
sendPrompt('What does the governor limit checker analyse?')
sendPrompt('Which Salesforce APIs does the org health monitor use?')
g.text: APIs used: Tooling API · Metadata API · REST API · SOQL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the weighted scoring work in the org health monitor?')
sendPrompt('How is the overall org health score calculated?')
sendPrompt('How does the remediation engine generate recommendations?')

g.text: Health Scan record · Finding__c object · Trend history · Scheduled snapshots

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the org health score gauge look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the module breakdown panel show?')
sendPrompt('What findings and recommendations does the dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the trend chart show in org health monitor?')
